chooseResponse.q: How do you feel about the club meeting?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Did you attend the environmental club meeting last night?
Advisor: Yes, I did! It was really informative.
Student: What topics did they cover?
Advisor: They discussed upcoming projects and volunteer opportunities.

questions.q: What was discussed at the meeting?
questions.explain: 他們討論了志願者機會。

questions.q: How did the student feel about the meeting?

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The annual campus-wide clean-up day is scheduled for next Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM. Supplies will be provided, and lunch will be served for all volunteers. Come join us to help keep our campus clean!

questions.q: When is the campus clean-up day?
What will be provided for volunteers?
questions.explain: 會為志願者提供午餐和用品。

talk.transcript: Today, I will explain the concept of renewable energy. Renewable energy refers to energy sources that are naturally replenished, such as solar, wind, and hydroelectric power. Unlike fossil fuels, which can take millions of years to form and can deplete, renewable energy sources are sustainable and can be harnessed without the fear of running out. This transition to renewable energy is crucial for reducing greenhouse gas emissions and combating climate change. By investing in renewable technologies, we can create a cleaner environment and ensure energy security for future generations.

questions.explain: 可再生能源是自然補充的能源。

questions.q: Why is the transition to renewable energy important?
questions.explain: 過渡到可再生能源有助於減少溫室氣體。

questions.q: Which is NOT a renewable energy source mentioned?
What can be achieved by investing in renewable technologies?
questions.explain: 投資可再生技術可確保能源安全。
